refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs targeting key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency and task execution efficiency) allows clearer design focus and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that optimized equipment operation and task execution contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize idle and transition times.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.
DP2: Implement intelligent task scheduling and coordination to reduce idle and transition times.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both equipment operation and task execution efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling may introduce coupling.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically distinct but must be coordinated; coupling is manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of real-time telemetry and tasking data.
Risk that poor coordination between DP1 and DP2 could reduce productivity gains.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface and data exchange protocols between vehicle control and task scheduling modules.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level coordination and integration of vehicle control and task scheduling to achieve productivity targets.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Real-time data exchange between vehicle and NGHE Solution for control and monitoring.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Task assignments and scheduling inputs from higher-level management or teleoperation.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication backbone supporting data exchange among modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of productivity-related functions; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module contains control algorithms but less scope for task scheduling.
Primarily for remote control, less direct productivity function containment.
Safety critical but minimal direct productivity function containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing productivity-related DPs in the NGHE Solution module maximizes containment and minimizes diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple DPs.
Risk of interface overload if external interfaces are not well managed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular sub-division within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and interface clarity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly maps to selected DPs addressing key productivity drivers with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module could lead to diffusion if not carefully managed.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via productivity metrics and telemetry data analysis at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of productivity-related functions to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Define clear sub-module boundaries within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity.
Establish robust interface protocols for Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize idle and transition times.

revise.why: To consider modular sub-division within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and interface clarity.

assumptions: Availability of real-time telemetry and tasking data.
Effective coordination between vehicle control and task scheduling.
open_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype NGHE Solution module.
Interface communication logs and error rates.
